prompt: Plan a minimal edit for a dev-server transform cache bug where stale module transforms are reused after an imported dependency changes. Identify the first files and symbols to inspect.

expected_symbols.name: transformRequest
expected_symbols.why: Main request transform path likely to read or write cached transform results.

expected_symbols.name: ModuleGraph
expected_symbols.why: Tracks dependency relationships and module invalidation state.

expected_symbols.name: createServerHMRChannel
expected_symbols.why: HMR behavior is relevant when dependency updates should invalidate transformed modules.

expected_symbols.name: createPluginContainer
expected_symbols.why: Plugin transforms can influence cached transform output.

expected_claims.text: The first implementation path to inspect is transformRequest because the report concerns reused transformed output.
ModuleGraph is relevant because dependency relationships drive invalidation.
HMR handling is relevant because file updates need to invalidate dependent modules.
Plugin container behavior should be considered because plugin transforms can affect cache keys and output.

forbidden_claims.text: The change can be localized to the command-line entry point without inspecting server transform code.
Dependency invalidation is unrelated to the module graph.
